title: feat: add Muse Spark 1.1
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `muse-spark-1.1` as a paid-only text/image-to-text model via Vercel AI Gateway.
- Adds `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` secret plumbing and encrypted dev/staging/prod secret entries.
- Sets pricing to Vercel/Meta rates with `priceMultiplier: 1`.
- Updates effective-price snapshot.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write ...`
- `gen`: `npm run typecheck`; `vitest` model permissions + text transform tests.
- `enter`: aliases, pricing-data, effective-prices snapshot.
- Local Gen E2E: text, streaming, tools, image input, Tinybird billing rows.
- Pushed Cloudflare Gen secrets to staging and production.

Notes:
- Vercel reports image input under prompt text tokens.
- Spark uses always-on reasoning; small `max_tokens` values can return empty visible content.

gist.headline: A New Muse Appears
gist.blurb: We've added Muse Spark 1.1 to our text and vision lineup! This always-on reasoning model is ready to tackle your complex prompts and image inputs.
gist.summary: Added Muse Spark 1.1 as a paid-only text and vision model via the Vercel AI Gateway, priced at standard Vercel/Meta rates.
gist.impact: Users can now query `muse-spark-1.1` for text and image-to-text generation, leveraging its always-on reasoning capabilities for complex tasks.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee interacting with a glowing spark of energy, representing the new Muse Spark model. The robot companion is amazed by the new reasoning capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) spark of energy in a retro hackerspace. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watches in awe as the spark illuminates the room. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
